external_baseline.reason: No authorized external Fable 5 baseline run is available in this repo.

checks.evidence: feature-complete but regressing solution scores correctness 100% but completeness 0% (overall 67%)
a solution that passes all black-box output checks but reimplements the dependency inline is caught by the reuse probe (context_retention 0%)
rung-3: 2 real agent solutions scored multi-dimensionally (reuse probe verified on live code: True)

limitations: Seed of scenarios with a deterministic auto-grader — the framework for real-scenario evaluation, not yet the proposal's 100+ live multi-hour sessions.

Red-team hardened: context_retention now uses a dependency-SWAP reuse probe (proven to catch an inline reimplementation that passes every black-box check); each scenario has its own flawed solution so discrimination is no longer a single circular foil.
Ambiguity is still encoded as a documented assumption per scenario; it does not yet test an agent's clarifying-question behavior on UNdocumented ambiguity.
Framework is ready to drive live providers via the capability adapter; expanding to a real 100+ scenario corpus is open work.

red_team_caveats: Real agent solutions, single model, only the 2 seed scenarios.
running_total real solution genuinely calls parse_amounts (reuse probe = 1.0), confirming the probe works on live code and the agent reused the dependency.
Still not the proposal 100+ live multi-hour ambiguous sessions; this is real solutions to seed scenarios, one rung above constructed reference/flawed pairs.
live_measurement.source: real mimo solutions scored by the multi-dimensional scenario rubric (incl. genuine reuse probe)

basis: scores correctness + completeness/no-regression + context retention + robustness
flags a feature-complete solution that regresses an existing case, which a correctness-only gate would pass
seed + framework; a 100+ live multi-hour corpus remains open work
